revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{神社| 名称=太部神社| 画像=| 所在地=岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1032| 祭神=[[国之常立神|国常立命]] [[タカミムスビ|高皇...'
revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=太部神社| 画像=| 所在地=岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1032| 祭神=[[国之常立神|国常立命]] [[タカミムスビ|高皇産霊神]] [[カミムスビ|神皇産霊神]]| 社格=旧村社| 創建=不明| 本殿=| 例祭=4月5日| 神事=| }} '''太部神社'''（たべじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[加茂郡 (岐阜県)|加茂郡]][[川辺町]]にある[[神社]]。
[[美濃国]][[加茂郡 (岐阜県)|賀茂郡]][[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の太部神社の論社である。別の説によると、太部神社は同じ川辺町にある[[太部古天神社]]という。
[[飛騨川]]に架かる[[新山川橋]]の東、約800mにある。
== 概略 == 創建時期は不明。元々は別の場所に鎮座していたが、焼失後現在地に移転再建されたという。焼失再建時期は不明であるが、[[天正]]4年（[[1576年]]）の年号が刻まれた木額が現存し、[[寛永]]16年（[[1639年]]）の造営の記録があることから、焼失時期は[[室町時代]]～[[江戸時代]]初期と推測される。
江戸時代は太梵天王宮と称していた。[[明治時代]]に太部神社に改称する。
== 祭神 == *[[国之常立神|国常立命]] *[[タカミムスビ|高皇産霊神]] *[[カミムスビ|神皇産霊神]]
== 境内社 == *八幡神社 *神明神社 *南宮神社 *秋葉神社
== 交通機関 == *[[高山本線]][[中川辺駅]]より徒歩20分
== その他 == *現在、旧太部神社跡地（岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1139）には田中神社が祀られている。
[[Category:岐阜県の神社|たへしんしや]] [[Category:川辺町 (岐阜県)|たへしんしや]] [[Category:式内小社|たへしんしや]] {{shinto-stub}}

江戸時代は太梵天王宮と称していた。[[明治時代]]に太部神社に改称する。
== 祭神 == *[[国之常立神|国常立命]] *[[タカミムスビ|高皇産霊神]] *[[カミムスビ|神皇産霊神]]
== 境内社 == *八幡神社 *神明神社 *南宮神社 *秋葉神社

== 境内社 == *八幡神社 *神明神社 *南宮神社 *秋葉神社
== 交通機関 == *[[高山本線]][[中川辺駅]]より徒歩20分
== その他 == *現在、旧太部神社跡地（岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1139）には田中神社が祀られている。
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや かわへ}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]]

{{神社| 名称=太部神社| 画像=[[File:Tabe shrine.jpg|thumb|太部神社（川辺町）]]| 所在地=岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1032| 位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|29|46.2|N|137|4|41.2|E|scale:20000}}| 祭神=[[国之常立神|国常立命]] [[タカミムスビ|高皇産霊神]] [[カミムスビ|神皇産霊神]]| 社格=式内社（小）、旧村社| 創建=不明| 本殿=| 例祭=4月5日| 神事=| }} '''太部神社'''（たべじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[加茂郡]][[川辺町]]にある[[神社]]。
[[美濃国]][[加茂郡|賀茂郡]][[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の太部神社の論社である。別の説によると、太部神社は同じ川辺町にある[[太部古天神社]]という。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は村社。
[[飛騨川]]に架かる[[新山川橋]]の東、約800mにある。
== 概略 == 創建時期は不明。元々は別の場所に鎮座していたが、焼失後現在地に移転再建されたという。焼失再建時期は不明であるが、[[天正]]4年（[[1576年]]）の年号が刻まれた木額が現存し、[[寛永]]16年（[[1639年]]）の造営の記録があることから、焼失時期は[[室町時代]]～[[江戸時代]]初期と推測される。
江戸時代は太梵天王宮と称していた。[[明治時代]]に太部神社に改称する。
== 祭神 == *[[国之常立神|国常立命]] *[[タカミムスビ|高皇産霊神]] *[[カミムスビ|神皇産霊神]]
== 境内社 == *八幡神社 *神明神社 *南宮神社 *秋葉神社
== 交通機関 == *[[高山本線]][[中川辺駅]]より徒歩20分
== その他 == *現在、旧太部神社跡地（岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1139）には田中神社が祀られている。
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや かわへ}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]]

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tabe Shrine'''|太部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

revision.comment: 15 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 | 名称=太部神社 | 画像=[[File:Tabe shrine.jpg|250px|太部神社（川辺町）]]
拝殿 | 所在地=[[岐阜県]][[加茂郡]][[川辺町]]比久見1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=[[国之常立神|国常立命]]　[[タカミムスビ|高皇産霊神]]　[[カミムスビ|神皇産霊神]] | 社格=[[式内社]]（小）、旧[[村社]] | 創建=不明 | 本殿= | 例祭=4月5日 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=太部神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''太部神社'''（たべじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[加茂郡]][[川辺町]]にある[[神社]]。 [[美濃国]][[加茂郡|賀茂郡]][[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の太部神社の論社である。別の説によると、太部神社は同じ川辺町にある[[太部古天神社]]という。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は村社。 [[飛騨川]]に架かる[[新山川橋]]の東、約800mにある。 == 概略 == 創建時期は不明。元々は別の場所に鎮座していたが、焼失後現在地に移転再建されたという。焼失再建時期は不明であるが、[[天正]]4年（[[1576年]]）の年号が刻まれた木額が現存し、[[寛永]]16年（[[1639年]]）の造営の記録があることから、焼失時期は[[室町時代]]～[[江戸時代]]初期と推測される。 江戸時代は太梵天王宮と称していた。[[明治時代]]に太部神社に改称する。 == 祭神 == *[[国之常立神|国常立命]] *[[タカミムスビ|高皇産霊神]] *[[カミムスビ|神皇産霊神]] == 境内社 == *八幡神社 *神明神社 *南宮神社 *秋葉神社 == 交通機関 == *[[高山本線]][[中川辺駅]]より徒歩20分 == その他 == *現在、旧太部神社跡地（岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1139）には田中神社が祀られている。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]]

[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[JA:太部神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11444532}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|太部神社|version=107303532|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 | 名称=太部神社 | 画像=[[File:Tabe shrine.jpg|250px|太部神社（川辺町）]]
拝殿 | 所在地=[[岐阜県]][[加茂郡]][[川辺町]]比久見1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=[[国之常立神|国常立命]]　[[タカミムスビ|高皇産霊神]]　[[カミムスビ|神皇産霊神]] | 社格=[[式内社]]（小）、旧[[村社]] | 創建=不明 | 本殿= | 例祭=4月5日 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=太部神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''太部神社'''（たべじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[加茂郡]][[川辺町]]にある[[神社]]。 [[美濃国]][[加茂郡|賀茂郡]][[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の太部神社の論社である。別の説によると、太部神社は同じ川辺町にある[[太部古天神社]]という。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は村社。 [[飛騨川]]に架かる[[新山川橋]]の東、約800mにある。 == 概略 == 創建時期は不明。元々は別の場所に鎮座していたが、焼失後現在地に移転再建されたという。焼失再建時期は不明であるが、[[天正]]4年（[[1576年]]）の年号が刻まれた木額が現存し、[[寛永]]16年（[[1639年]]）の造営の記録があることから、焼失時期は[[室町時代]]～[[江戸時代]]初期と推測される。 江戸時代は太梵天王宮と称していた。[[明治時代]]に太部神社に改称する。 == 祭神 == *[[国之常立神|国常立命]] *[[タカミムスビ|高皇産霊神]] *[[カミムスビ|神皇産霊神]] == 境内社 == *八幡神社 *神明神社 *南宮神社 *秋葉神社 == 交通機関 == *[[高山本線]][[中川辺駅]]より徒歩20分 == その他 == *現在、旧太部神社跡地（岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1139）には田中神社が祀られている。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]] ==End Japanese==

page|ja|太部神社|version=107303532|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 | 名称=太部神社 | 画像=[[File:Tabe shrine.jpg|250px|太部神社（川辺町）]]
拝殿 | 所在地=[[岐阜県]][[加茂郡]][[川辺町]]比久見1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=[[国之常立神|国常立命]]　[[タカミムスビ|高皇産霊神]]　[[カミムスビ|神皇産霊神]] | 社格=[[式内社]]（小）、旧[[村社]] | 創建=不明 | 本殿= | 例祭=4月5日 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=太部神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''太部神社'''（たべじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[加茂郡]][[川辺町]]にある[[神社]]。 [[美濃国]][[加茂郡|賀茂郡]][[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の太部神社の論社である。別の説によると、太部神社は同じ川辺町にある[[太部古天神社]]という。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は村社。 [[飛騨川]]に架かる[[新山川橋]]の東、約800mにある。 == 概略 == 創建時期は不明。元々は別の場所に鎮座していたが、焼失後現在地に移転再建されたという。焼失再建時期は不明であるが、[[天正]]4年（[[1576年]]）の年号が刻まれた木額が現存し、[[寛永]]16年（[[1639年]]）の造営の記録があることから、焼失時期は[[室町時代]]～[[江戸時代]]初期と推測される。 江戸時代は太梵天王宮と称していた。[[明治時代]]に太部神社に改称する。 == 祭神 == *[[国之常立神|国常立命]] *[[タカミムスビ|高皇産霊神]] *[[カミムスビ|神皇産霊神]] == 境内社 == *八幡神社 *神明神社 *南宮神社 *秋葉神社 == 交通機関 == *[[高山本線]][[中川辺駅]]より徒歩20分 == その他 == *現在、旧太部神社跡地（岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1139）には田中神社が祀られている。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]]

== * {'text': '岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1032', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:太部神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11444532}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=太部神社 | 画像=[[File:Tabe shrine.jpg|250px|太部神社（川辺町）]]
拝殿 | 所在地={{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656}}{{jalink|川辺町|Q1203748}}比久見1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|国之常立神|Q478504|国常立命}}　{{jalink|タカミムスビ||高皇産霊神}}　{{jalink|カミムスビ||神皇産霊神}} | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}（小）、旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} | 創建=不明 | 本殿= | 例祭=4月5日 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=太部神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''太部神社'''（たべじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656}}{{jalink|川辺町|Q1203748}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656|賀茂郡}}{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の太部神社の論社である。別の説によると、太部神社は同じ川辺町にある{{jalink|太部古天神社|Q11444530}}という。{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|旧社格}}は村社。 {{jalink|飛騨川|Q3366160}}に架かる{{jalink|新山川橋|Q11502002}}の東、約800mにある。 === 概略 === 創建時期は不明。元々は別の場所に鎮座していたが、焼失後現在地に移転再建されたという。焼失再建時期は不明であるが、{{jalink|天正|Q1145058}}4年（{{jalink|1576年|Q6700}}）の年号が刻まれた木額が現存し、{{jalink|寛永|Q1192913}}16年（{{jalink|1639年|Q6897}}）の造営の記録があることから、焼失時期は{{jalink|室町時代|Q334845}}～{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}初期と推測される。 江戸時代は太梵天王宮と称していた。{{jalink|明治時代}}に太部神社に改称する。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|国之常立神|Q478504|国常立命}} *{{jalink|タカミムスビ||高皇産霊神}} *{{jalink|カミムスビ||神皇産霊神}} === 境内社 === *八幡神社 *神明神社 *南宮神社 *秋葉神社 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|高山本線|Q1188357}}{{jalink|中川辺駅|Q5358732}}より徒歩20分 === その他 === *現在、旧太部神社跡地（岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1139）には田中神社が祀られている。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]]

拝殿 | 所在地={{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656}}{{jalink|川辺町|Q1203748}}比久見1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|国之常立神|Q478504|国常立命}}　{{jalink|タカミムスビ||高皇産霊神}}　{{jalink|カミムスビ||神皇産霊神}} | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}（小）、旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} | 創建=不明 | 本殿= | 例祭=4月5日 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=太部神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''太部神社'''（たべじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656}}{{jalink|川辺町|Q1203748}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656|賀茂郡}}{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の太部神社の論社である。別の説によると、太部神社は同じ川辺町にある{{jalink|太部古天神社|Q11444530}}という。{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|旧社格}}は村社。 {{jalink|飛騨川|Q3366160}}に架かる{{jalink|新山川橋|Q11502002}}の東、約800mにある。 === 概略 === 創建時期は不明。元々は別の場所に鎮座していたが、焼失後現在地に移転再建されたという。焼失再建時期は不明であるが、{{jalink|天正|Q1145058}}4年（{{jalink|1576年|Q6700}}）の年号が刻まれた木額が現存し、{{jalink|寛永|Q1192913}}16年（{{jalink|1639年|Q6897}}）の造営の記録があることから、焼失時期は{{jalink|室町時代|Q334845}}～{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}初期と推測される。 江戸時代は太梵天王宮と称していた。{{jalink|明治時代}}に太部神社に改称する。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|国之常立神|Q478504|国常立命}} *{{jalink|タカミムスビ||高皇産霊神}} *{{jalink|カミムスビ||神皇産霊神}} === 境内社 === *八幡神社 *神明神社 *南宮神社 *秋葉神社 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|高山本線|Q1188357}}{{jalink|中川辺駅|Q5358732}}より徒歩20分 === その他 === *現在、旧太部神社跡地（岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1139）には田中神社が祀られている。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

拝殿 | 所在地={{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656}}{{jalink|川辺町|Q1203748}}比久見1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|国之常立神|Q478504|国常立命}}　{{jalink|タカミムスビ||高皇産霊神}}　{{jalink|カミムスビ||神皇産霊神}} | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}（小）、旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} | 創建=不明 | 本殿= | 例祭=4月5日 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=太部神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''太部神社'''（たべじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656}}{{jalink|川辺町|Q1203748}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656|賀茂郡}}{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の太部神社の論社である。別の説によると、太部神社は同じ川辺町にある{{jalink|太部古天神社|Q11444530}}という。{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|旧社格}}は村社。 {{jalink|飛騨川|Q3366160}}に架かる{{jalink|新山川橋|Q11502002}}の東、約800mにある。 === 概略 === 創建時期は不明。元々は別の場所に鎮座していたが、焼失後現在地に移転再建されたという。焼失再建時期は不明であるが、{{jalink|天正|Q1145058}}4年（{{jalink|1576年|Q6700}}）の年号が刻まれた木額が現存し、{{jalink|寛永|Q1192913}}16年（{{jalink|1639年|Q6897}}）の造営の記録があることから、焼失時期は{{jalink|室町時代|Q334845}}～{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}初期と推測される。 江戸時代は太梵天王宮と称していた。{{jalink|明治時代}}に太部神社に改称する。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|国之常立神|Q478504|国常立命}} *{{jalink|タカミムスビ||高皇産霊神}} *{{jalink|カミムスビ||神皇産霊神}} === 境内社 === *八幡神社 *神明神社 *南宮神社 *秋葉神社 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|高山本線|Q1188357}}{{jalink|中川辺駅|Q5358732}}より徒歩20分 === その他 === *現在、旧太部神社跡地（岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1139）には田中神社が祀られている。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

拝殿 | 所在地={{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656}}{{jalink|川辺町|Q1203748}}比久見1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|国之常立神|Q478504|国常立命}}　{{jalink|タカミムスビ||高皇産霊神}}　{{jalink|カミムスビ||神皇産霊神}} | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}（小）、旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} | 創建=不明 | 本殿= | 例祭=4月5日 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=太部神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''太部神社'''（たべじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656}}{{jalink|川辺町|Q1203748}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656|賀茂郡}}{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の太部神社の論社である。別の説によると、太部神社は同じ川辺町にある{{jalink|太部古天神社|Q11444530}}という。{{jalink|近代社格制度|Q712534|旧社格}}は村社。 {{jalink|飛騨川|Q3366160}}に架かる{{jalink|新山川橋|Q11502002}}の東、約800mにある。 === 概略 === 創建時期は不明。元々は別の場所に鎮座していたが、焼失後現在地に移転再建されたという。焼失再建時期は不明であるが、{{jalink|天正|Q1145058}}4年（{{jalink|1576年|Q6700}}）の年号が刻まれた木額が現存し、{{jalink|寛永|Q1192913}}16年（{{jalink|1639年|Q6897}}）の造営の記録があることから、焼失時期は{{jalink|室町時代|Q334845}}～{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}初期と推測される。 江戸時代は太梵天王宮と称していた。{{jalink|明治時代}}に太部神社に改称する。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|国之常立神|Q478504|国常立命}} *{{jalink|タカミムスビ||高皇産霊神}} *{{jalink|カミムスビ||神皇産霊神}} === 境内社 === *八幡神社 *神明神社 *南宮神社 *秋葉神社 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|高山本線|Q1188357}}{{jalink|中川辺駅|Q5358732}}より徒歩20分 === その他 === *現在、旧太部神社跡地（岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1139）には田中神社が祀られている。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

== * {'text': '岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1032', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:太部神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11444532}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Tabe Shrine | 画像=[[File:Tabe shrine.jpg|250px|Tabe Shrine (Kawabe)]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Kamo District|Q1348656}}{{jalink|Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748}} Hikumi 1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|Kunitokotachi|Q478504|Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} {{jalink|Takamimusubi||Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} {{jalink|Kamimusubi||Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} | 社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (minor), former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} | 創建=unknown | 本殿= | 例祭=April 5 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tabe Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tabe Shrine''' (たべじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q1348656}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}. It is a candidate shrine (ronsha) for Tabe Shrine in Kamo District, {{jalink|Mino Province|Q864156}}, in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Shikinaisha register}}. Another theory identifies Tabe Shrine as {{jalink|Tabe Furuten Shrine|Q11444530}} in the same Kawabe town. Its {{jalink|former rank under the modern system|Q712534|former rank}} was village shrine. It is about 800 m east of {{jalink|Shinyamakawa Bridge|Q11502002}} over the {{jalink|Hida River|Q3366160}}. === Overview === The founding period is unknown. It was originally enshrined in a different location, but after being destroyed by fire it was relocated and rebuilt at the present site. The date of the fire and rebuilding is unknown, but a wooden plaque inscribed with {{jalink|1576|Q6700}} ({{jalink|Tenshō|Q1145058}} 4) remains, and there is a construction record for {{jalink|1639|Q6897}} ({{jalink|Kan'ei|Q1192913}} 16), so the fire is presumed to have occurred between the {{jalink|Muromachi period|Q334845}} and early {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}. In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{jalink|Kunitokotachi|Q478504|Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} *{{jalink|Takamimusubi||Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} *{{jalink|Kamimusubi||Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732}} on the {{jalink|Takayama Main Line|Q1188357}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: used local AI agents to translate these pages. Contrary to the description it was actually Claude Code for a few, OpenClaw with Codex, and regular Codex. Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

{{ill|Q135159299|lt=Q135159299|WD=Q135159299}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|lt=Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|WD=Q3029647}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|lt=Q17|WD=Q17}} == name in kana (P1814) == * たべじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5200005006744 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135039906|lt=Q135039906|WD=Q135039906}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1032', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:太部神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11444532}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Tabe Shrine | 画像=[[File:Tabe shrine.jpg|250px|Tabe Shrine (Kawabe)]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Kamo District|Q1348656}}{{jalink|Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748}} Hikumi 1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|Kunitokotachi|Q478504|Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} {{jalink|Takamimusubi||Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} {{jalink|Kamimusubi||Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} | 社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (minor), former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} | 創建=unknown | 本殿= | 例祭=April 5 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tabe Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tabe Shrine''' (たべじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q1348656}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}. It is a candidate shrine (ronsha) for Tabe Shrine in Kamo District, {{jalink|Mino Province|Q864156}}, in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Shikinaisha register}}. Another theory identifies Tabe Shrine as {{jalink|Tabe Furuten Shrine|Q11444530}} in the same Kawabe town. Its {{jalink|former rank under the modern system|Q712534|former rank}} was village shrine. It is about 800 m east of {{jalink|Shinyamakawa Bridge|Q11502002}} over the {{jalink|Hida River|Q3366160}}. === Overview === The founding period is unknown. It was originally enshrined in a different location, but after being destroyed by fire it was relocated and rebuilt at the present site. The date of the fire and rebuilding is unknown, but a wooden plaque inscribed with {{jalink|1576|Q6700}} ({{jalink|Tenshō|Q1145058}} 4) remains, and there is a construction record for {{jalink|1639|Q6897}} ({{jalink|Kan'ei|Q1192913}} 16), so the fire is presumed to have occurred between the {{jalink|Muromachi period|Q334845}} and early {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}. In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{jalink|Kunitokotachi|Q478504|Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} *{{jalink|Takamimusubi||Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} *{{jalink|Kamimusubi||Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732}} on the {{jalink|Takayama Main Line|Q1188357}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

== * {'text': '岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1032', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:太部神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11444532}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Tabe Shrine | 画像=[[File:Tabe shrine.jpg|250px|Tabe Shrine (Kawabe)]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Kamo District|Q1348656}}{{jalink|Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748}} Hikumi 1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|Kunitokotachi|Q478504|Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} {{jalink|Takamimusubi||Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} {{jalink|Kamimusubi||Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} | 社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (minor), former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} | 創建=unknown | 本殿= | 例祭=April 5 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tabe Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tabe Shrine''' (たべじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q1348656}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}. It is a candidate shrine (ronsha) for Tabe Shrine in Kamo District, {{jalink|Mino Province|Q864156}}, in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Shikinaisha register}}. Another theory identifies Tabe Shrine as {{jalink|Tabe Furuten Shrine|Q11444530}} in the same Kawabe town. Its {{jalink|former rank under the modern system|Q712534|former rank}} was village shrine. It is about 800 m east of {{jalink|Shinyamakawa Bridge|Q11502002}} over the {{jalink|Hida River|Q3366160}}. === Overview === The founding period is unknown. It was originally enshrined in a different location, but after being destroyed by fire it was relocated and rebuilt at the present site. The date of the fire and rebuilding is unknown, but a wooden plaque inscribed with {{jalink|1576|Q6700}} ({{jalink|Tenshō|Q1145058}} 4) remains, and there is a construction record for {{jalink|1639|Q6897}} ({{jalink|Kan'ei|Q1192913}} 16), so the fire is presumed to have occurred between the {{jalink|Muromachi period|Q334845}} and early {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}. In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{jalink|Kunitokotachi|Q478504|Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} *{{jalink|Takamimusubi||Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} *{{jalink|Kamimusubi||Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732}} on the {{jalink|Takayama Main Line|Q1188357}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]]

In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{jalink|Kunitokotachi|Q478504|Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} *{{jalink|Takamimusubi||Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} *{{jalink|Kamimusubi||Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732}} on the {{jalink|Takayama Main Line|Q1188357}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Another theory identifies Tabe Shrine as {{ill|lt=Tabe Furuten Shrine|Q11444530|WD=Q11444530}} in the same Kawabe town. Its {{ill|lt=former rank under the modern system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=former rank}} was village shrine. It is about 800 m east of {{ill|lt=Shinyamakawa Bridge|Q11502002|WD=Q11502002}} over the {{ill|lt=Hida River|Q3366160|WD=Q3366160}}. === Overview === The founding period is unknown. It was originally enshrined in a different location, but after being destroyed by fire it was relocated and rebuilt at the present site. In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} *{{ill|lt=Takamimusubi||WD=|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} *{{ill|lt=Kamimusubi||WD=|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732|WD=Q5358732}} on the {{ill|lt=Takayama Main Line|Q1188357|WD=Q1188357}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== * {'text': '岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1032', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:太部神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11444532}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Tabe Shrine | 画像=[[File:Tabe shrine.jpg|250px|Tabe Shrine (Kawabe)]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q1348656|WD=Q1348656}}{{ill|lt=Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748|WD=Q1203748}} Hikumi 1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} {{ill|lt=Takamimusubi||WD=|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} {{ill|lt=Kamimusubi||WD=|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} | 社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} (minor), former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} | 創建=unknown | 本殿= | 例祭=April 5 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tabe Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tabe Shrine''' (たべじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748|WD=Q1203748}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q1348656|WD=Q1348656}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}. It is a candidate shrine (ronsha) for Tabe Shrine in Kamo District, {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register}}. Another theory identifies Tabe Shrine as {{ill|lt=Tabe Furuten Shrine|Q11444530|WD=Q11444530}} in the same Kawabe town. Its {{ill|lt=former rank under the modern system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=former rank}} was village shrine. It is about 800 m east of {{ill|lt=Shinyamakawa Bridge|Q11502002|WD=Q11502002}} over the {{ill|lt=Hida River|Q3366160|WD=Q3366160}}. === Overview === The founding period is unknown. It was originally enshrined in a different location, but after being destroyed by fire it was relocated and rebuilt at the present site. The date of the fire and rebuilding is unknown, but a wooden plaque inscribed with {{ill|lt=1576|Q6700|WD=Q6700}} ({{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|WD=Q1145058}} 4) remains, and there is a construction record for {{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897}} ({{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913}} 16), so the fire is presumed to have occurred between the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845}} and early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}. In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} *{{ill|lt=Takamimusubi||WD=|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} *{{ill|lt=Kamimusubi||WD=|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732|WD=Q5358732}} on the {{ill|lt=Takayama Main Line|Q1188357|WD=Q1188357}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== * {'text': '岐阜県加茂郡川辺町比久見1032', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:太部神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11444532}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Tabe Shrine | 画像=[[File:Tabe shrine.jpg|250px|Tabe Shrine (Kawabe)]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q1348656|WD=Q1348656}}{{ill|lt=Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748|WD=Q1203748}} Hikumi 1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} {{ill|lt=Takamimusubi|UNKNOWN|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} {{ill|lt=Kamimusubi|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} | 社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} (minor), former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} | 創建=unknown | 本殿= | 例祭=April 5 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tabe Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tabe Shrine''' (たべじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748|WD=Q1203748}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q1348656|WD=Q1348656}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}. It is a candidate shrine (ronsha) for Tabe Shrine in Kamo District, {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register}}. Another theory identifies Tabe Shrine as {{ill|lt=Tabe Furuten Shrine|Q11444530|WD=Q11444530}} in the same Kawabe town. Its {{ill|lt=former rank under the modern system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=former rank}} was village shrine. It is about 800 m east of {{ill|lt=Shinyamakawa Bridge|Q11502002|WD=Q11502002}} over the {{ill|lt=Hida River|Q3366160|WD=Q3366160}}. === Overview === The founding period is unknown. It was originally enshrined in a different location, but after being destroyed by fire it was relocated and rebuilt at the present site. The date of the fire and rebuilding is unknown, but a wooden plaque inscribed with {{ill|lt=1576|Q6700|WD=Q6700}} ({{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|WD=Q1145058}} 4) remains, and there is a construction record for {{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897}} ({{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913}} 16), so the fire is presumed to have occurred between the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845}} and early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}. In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} *{{ill|lt=Takamimusubi|UNKNOWN|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} *{{ill|lt=Kamimusubi|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732|WD=Q5358732}} on the {{ill|lt=Takayama Main Line|Q1188357|WD=Q1188357}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Worship hall | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q1348656|WD=Q1348656}}{{ill|lt=Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748|WD=Q1203748}} Hikumi 1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} {{ill|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} {{ill|lt=Kamimusubi|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} | 社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} (minor), former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} | 創建=unknown | 本殿= | 例祭=April 5 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tabe Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tabe Shrine''' (たべじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748|WD=Q1203748}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q1348656|WD=Q1348656}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}. It is a candidate shrine (ronsha) for Tabe Shrine in Kamo District, {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register}}. Another theory identifies Tabe Shrine as {{ill|lt=Tabe Furuten Shrine|Q11444530|WD=Q11444530}} in the same Kawabe town. Its {{ill|lt=former rank under the modern system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=former rank}} was village shrine. It is about 800 m east of {{ill|lt=Shinyamakawa Bridge|Q11502002|WD=Q11502002}} over the {{ill|lt=Hida River|Q3366160|WD=Q3366160}}. === Overview === The founding period is unknown. It was originally enshrined in a different location, but after being destroyed by fire it was relocated and rebuilt at the present site. The date of the fire and rebuilding is unknown, but a wooden plaque inscribed with {{ill|lt=1576|Q6700|WD=Q6700}} ({{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|WD=Q1145058}} 4) remains, and there is a construction record for {{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897}} ({{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913}} 16), so the fire is presumed to have occurred between the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845}} and early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}. In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} *{{ill|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} *{{ill|lt=Kamimusubi|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732|WD=Q5358732}} on the {{ill|lt=Takayama Main Line|Q1188357|WD=Q1188357}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

The date of the fire and rebuilding is unknown, but a wooden plaque inscribed with {{ill|lt=1576|Q6700|WD=Q6700}} ({{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|WD=Q1145058}} 4) remains, and there is a construction record for {{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897}} ({{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913}} 16), so the fire is presumed to have occurred between the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845}} and early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}. In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto}} *{{ill|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} *{{ill|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732|WD=Q5358732}} on the {{ill|lt=Takayama Main Line|Q1188357|WD=Q1188357}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It is a candidate shrine (ronsha) for Tabe Shrine in Kamo District, {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. Another theory identifies Tabe Shrine as {{ill|lt=Tabe Furuten Shrine|Q11444530|WD=Q11444530|1=Tabekoten Shrine}} in the same Kawabe town. Its {{ill|lt=former rank under the modern system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=former rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} was village shrine. It is about 800 m east of {{ill|lt=Shinyamakawa Bridge|Q11502002|WD=Q11502002|1=Shinyamakawa Bridge}} over the {{ill|lt=Hida River|Q3366160|WD=Q3366160|1=Hida River}}. === Overview === The founding period is unknown. It was originally enshrined in a different location, but after being destroyed by fire it was relocated and rebuilt at the present site. The date of the fire and rebuilding is unknown, but a wooden plaque inscribed with {{ill|lt=1576|Q6700|WD=Q6700|1=1576}} ({{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|WD=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 4) remains, and there is a construction record for {{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897|1=1639}} ({{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913|1=Kan'ei}} 16), so the fire is presumed to have occurred between the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}} and early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}. In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi}} *{{ill|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}} *{{ill|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Kamimusubi}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732|WD=Q5358732|1=Nakakawabe Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Takayama Main Line|Q1188357|WD=Q1188357|1=Takayama Main Line}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たへしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It is a candidate shrine (ronsha) for Tabe Shrine in Kamo District, {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. Another theory identifies Tabe Shrine as {{ill|lt=Tabe Furuten Shrine|Q11444530|WD=Q11444530|1=Tabekoten Shrine}} in the same Kawabe town. Its {{ill|lt=former rank under the modern system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=former rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} was village shrine. It is about 800 m east of {{ill|lt=Shinyamakawa Bridge|Q11502002|WD=Q11502002|1=Shinyamakawa Bridge}} over the {{ill|lt=Hida River|Q3366160|WD=Q3366160|1=Hida River}}. === Overview === The founding period is unknown. It was originally enshrined in a different location, but after being destroyed by fire it was relocated and rebuilt at the present site. The date of the fire and rebuilding is unknown, but a wooden plaque inscribed with {{ill|lt=1576|Q6700|WD=Q6700|1=1576}} ({{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|WD=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 4) remains, and there is a construction record for {{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897|1=1639}} ({{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913|1=Kan'ei}} 16), so the fire is presumed to have occurred between the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}} and early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}. In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi}} *{{ill|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}} *{{ill|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Kamimusubi}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732|WD=Q5358732|1=Nakakawabe Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Takayama Main Line|Q1188357|WD=Q1188357|1=Takayama Main Line}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]]

It is a candidate shrine (ronsha) for Tabe Shrine in Kamo District, {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. Another theory identifies Tabe Shrine as {{ill|lt=Tabe Furuten Shrine|Q11444530|WD=Q11444530|1=Tabekoten Shrine}} in the same Kawabe town. Its {{ill|lt=former rank under the modern system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=former rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} was village shrine. It is about 800 m east of {{ill|lt=Shinyamakawa Bridge|Q11502002|WD=Q11502002|1=Shinyamakawa Bridge}} over the {{ill|lt=Hida River|Q3366160|WD=Q3366160|1=Hida River}}. === Overview === The founding period is unknown. It was originally enshrined in a different location, but after being destroyed by fire it was relocated and rebuilt at the present site. The date of the fire and rebuilding is unknown, but a wooden plaque inscribed with {{ill|lt=1576|Q6700|WD=Q6700|1=1576}} ({{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|WD=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 4) remains, and there is a construction record for {{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897|1=1639}} ({{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913|1=Kan'ei}} 16), so the fire is presumed to have occurred between the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}} and early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}. In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi}} *{{ill|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}} *{{ill|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Kamimusubi}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732|WD=Q5358732|1=Nakakawabe Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Takayama Main Line|Q1188357|WD=Q1188357|1=Takayama Main Line}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:Son-sha in Gifu Prefecture]][[Category:qq]]

In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi}} *{{ill|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}} *{{ill|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Kamimusubi}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732|WD=Q5358732|1=Nakakawabe Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Takayama Main Line|Q1188357|WD=Q1188357|1=Takayama Main Line}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Gifu Prefecture]]

== Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Tabe Shrine | 画像=[[File:Tabe shrine.jpg|250px|Tabe Shrine (Kawabe)]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q1348656|WD=Q1348656|1=Kamo District, Gifu}}{{ill|lt=Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748|WD=Q1203748|1=Kawabe, Gifu}} Hikumi 1032 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi}} {{ill|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}} {{ill|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Kamimusubi}} | 社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (minor), former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} | 創建=unknown | 本殿= | 例祭=April 5 | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Tabe Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Tabe Shrine''' (たべじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kawabe, Gifu|Q1203748|WD=Q1203748|1=Kawabe, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q1348656|WD=Q1348656|1=Kamo District, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. It is a candidate shrine (ronsha) for Tabe Shrine in Kamo District, {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}, in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. Another theory identifies Tabe Shrine as {{ill|lt=Tabe Furuten Shrine|Q11444530|WD=Q11444530|1=Tabekoten Shrine}} in the same Kawabe town. Its {{ill|lt=former rank under the modern system|Q712534|WD=Q712534|lt=former rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} was village shrine. It is about 800 m east of {{ill|lt=Shinyamakawa Bridge|Q11502002|WD=Q11502002|1=Shinyamakawa Bridge}} over the {{ill|lt=Hida River|Q3366160|WD=Q3366160|1=Hida River}}. === Overview === The founding period is unknown. It was originally enshrined in a different location, but after being destroyed by fire it was relocated and rebuilt at the present site. The date of the fire and rebuilding is unknown, but a wooden plaque inscribed with {{ill|lt=1576|Q6700|WD=Q6700|1=1576}} ({{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|WD=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 4) remains, and there is a construction record for {{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897|1=1639}} ({{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913|1=Kan'ei}} 16), so the fire is presumed to have occurred between the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|WD=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}} and early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}. In the Edo period it was called Taibonten'ō-gū. In the Meiji period it was renamed Tabe Shrine. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi|Q478504|WD=Q478504|WD=Q478504|lt=Kunitokotachi-no-Mikoto|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi}} *{{ill|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}} *{{ill|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi|UNKNOWN|WD=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Kamimusubi}} === Precinct shrines === *Hachiman Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Nangū Shrine *Akiba Shrine === Transportation === *20 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Naka-Kawabe Station|Q5358732|WD=Q5358732|1=Nakakawabe Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Takayama Main Line|Q1188357|WD=Q1188357|1=Takayama Main Line}} === Other === *At the former Tabe Shrine site (1139 Hikumi, Kawabe, Kamo District, Gifu), Tanaka Shrine is currently enshrined. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tabe Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Gifu Prefecture]]
